creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2008-12-07 09:27:15 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    games                Makefile 
  Added files:
    games/bsdrain        Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
  Log:
  Rain is an animated raindrops display program modelled after the VMS program
  of the same name.
  
  This program was originally included in the 4.4 BSD distribution set. This
  version was taken from NetBSD.
  
  WWW: http://cvsweb.netbsd.org/bsdweb.cgi/src/games/rain/
  
  PR:             ports/128136
  Submitted by:   Jacob Myers
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1253    +1 -0      ports/games/Makefile
  1.1       +24 -0     ports/games/bsdrain/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/games/bsdrain/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +7 -0      ports/games/bsdrain/pkg-descr (new)
